# FixMyTyreNow

> London's fastest mobile tyre fitting service. 20-minute average arrival across all 32 boroughs. Emergency 24/7. From £25.

FixMyTyreNow (Company No. 12665318) is a mobile tyre fitting service operating across all 32 London boroughs. Fully equipped tyre fitting vans come directly to the customer's location — home driveway, workplace, office car park, multi-storey, or roadside — with no need to visit a garage. The service operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week for emergency callouts. Scheduled bookings are available daily 06:00–22:00. Average technician arrival time is 20 minutes. The service holds 4.9 out of 5 stars from 912 verified Google reviews.

## Services and Pricing

- **Emergency Tyre Replacement** — from £69 per tyre including fitting. 24/7 availability. Technician dispatched immediately.
- **Standard Tyre Fitting** — from £65 per tyre including fitting. Same-day and next-day scheduling available.
- **Puncture Repair** — from £25. Industry-standard plug-and-patch method. Road-legal, manufacturer-approved repair.
- **Wheel Balancing** — from £15 per wheel. Computerised on-site balancing equipment.
- **Run-Flat Replacement** — from £110 per tyre including fitting. Specialist service for BMW, Mercedes-Benz, Mini, and other run-flat equipped vehicles.

Tyre brands stocked: Michelin, Continental, Pirelli, Bridgestone, Goodyear, Dunlop, Yokohama, and budget alternatives. All tyres supplied carry the manufacturer's warranty. Fitting work is guaranteed for 12 months.

## Coverage — All 32 London Boroughs

Barking and Dagenham, Barnet, Bexley, Brent, Bromley, Camden, City of Westminster, Croydon, Ealing, Enfield, Greenwich, Hackney, Hammersmith and Fulham, Haringey, Harrow, Havering, Hillingdon, Hounslow, Islington, Kensington and Chelsea, Kingston upon Thames, Lambeth, Lewisham, Merton, Newham, Redbridge, Richmond upon Thames, Southwark, Sutton, Tower Hamlets, Waltham Forest, Wandsworth.

Service area spans from Uxbridge in the west to Romford in the east, and from Enfield in the north to Croydon in the south.

## How to Book

1. Book online at https://fixmytyrenow.com — select Emergency or Scheduled service
2. Choose tyre type and confirm location
3. Pay £10 deposit (deducted from final bill) to confirm the slot
4. Technician arrives — average 20 minutes for emergencies
5. Balance paid on completion by card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or bank transfer

Minimum booking deposit: £10. No callout fees. Transparent pricing — final price confirmed before work begins.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How quickly can you arrive?**
Average arrival time is 20 minutes across London. During peak hours or in outer boroughs this may extend to 30–40 minutes. For emergencies, the fastest available technician is always dispatched first.

**Do you operate 24/7?**
Emergency tyre replacements are available 24 hours a day, 365 days a year including bank holidays and Christmas Day. Scheduled bookings are available daily 06:00–22:00.

**What is the £10 deposit?**
The £10 deposit is taken at booking to secure the time slot. It is fully deducted from the final invoice. Non-refundable only if the customer cancels within 30 minutes of technician arrival.

**Can you come to my workplace or car park?**
Yes. The service operates at any accessible location — home driveway, office car park, multi-storey car park, roadside, or supermarket car park.

**What payment methods are accepted?**
Visa, Mastercard, American Express, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfer. The £10 deposit is processed via Revolut. Cash is not accepted.

**Do you fit all tyre sizes?**
Vans carry the most common UK tyre sizes from multiple brands. For less common sizes, a 30–60 minute sourcing window may apply.

**Is there a callout fee?**
No callout fee. Pricing is transparent — the quote confirmed before work begins covers all labour and fitting.
